c1.title: 1. Start and Installation
c1.intro: Welcome to Regentum! Your operation center for professional rental management. Our platform centralizes control of properties, tenants, and finances in an environment designed for agility and transparency. Regentum allows you to manage multiple properties, both with temporary and long-term contracts, report to owners, send contracts for digital signature, and much more.
c1.feature_1: Multi-user: Authorize partners and operators with different access levels.
c1.feature_2: Multi-currency: Manage your assets in dollars, pesos, and other currencies.
c1.feature_3: Multi-lingual: The interface adapts to your language.
c1.feature_4: Multi-platform: Access from PC, Tablet, or Phone.
c1.install_desc: Install Regentum on your home screen for a professional experience.
c1.android_step: Tap the three dots and select 'Install app'.
c1.ios_step: Tap 'Share' and select 'Add to Home Screen'.
c1.pc_step: Click the installation icon in the address bar.
c1.tip: Tip: Installing the app enables real-time critical notifications.

c2.title: 2. Master Configuration
c2.intro: Before loading your first property, it is essential to have the platform ready. These settings ensure your documents have your brand and the team works in harmony.
c2.style_desc: Customize your experience from the User Menu (avatar icon in the top right corner): Language and Dark Mode.
c2.branding_desc: In the Brand tab, in the Settings section, upload your company's official logo.
c2.team_desc: Authorize partners or employees in the Team tab, within the Settings section, linking them with their Google email. This will give them access to the platform with the role you have assigned them.
c2.admin_desc: Full access to finances, settings, and data deletion.
c2.staff_desc: Loading bookings and tasks. They don't see financial data.
c2.currency_desc: In the Settings/Currencies tab, select the currencies your business operates with (USD, EUR, ARS, etc.). Define a Base Currency: it is the one the system will use by default in forms and general reports.
c2.lists_desc: Customize lists to classify your information: from the corresponding tabs in Settings, manage Tenant Origins, Task Categories and Expense Categories.
c2.tip: Tip: Properly configuring origins will allow you to see which sales channel is most profitable.

c3.title: 3. Asset Management
c3.intro: To start managing bookings, you must first load your Properties and Tenants.
c3.properties_desc: Each unit has its own independent management file.
c3.prop_item_1: Owner Data: Link their Google email to enable their access to the Owner Portal.
c3.prop_item_2: Management Commission: Define the percentage you charge for your management to automate settlements.
c3.prop_item_3: Notes to Owner: Specific messages or instructions that the owner will see in their private portal.
c3.contract_item_1: Lessor Signature: Upload your signature in transparent PNG to stamp it on generated documents.
c3.contract_item_2: Templates with Markers: Use codes like {{inquilino.nombre}} so the system fills in contracts automatically.
c3.tenants_desc: Centralize your contacts to create bookings in seconds.
c3.tenant_item_1: Profile and Origin: Record where they contacted you from to measure the effectiveness of your channels.
c3.tenant_item_2: Star Rating: Evaluate your tenants. Low ratings show a red alert to protect your business.
c3.tip: Tip: Low ratings show a red alert to protect your business.

c4.title: 4. Temporary Rental
c4.intro: The temporary rental lifecycle in Regentum is designed to be fast and error-free, centralizing everything from the property file or through quick actions.
c4.start_desc: You have two ways to register a new entry:
c4.path_property: From the Property File: Enter the property and go to the Temporary tab. Press '+ New Booking'.
c4.path_quick: From Quick Actions: Tap the floating '+' button (bottom right corner) and choose 'New Booking'.
c4.process_item_1: Tenant: Select from the search dropdown.
c4.process_item_2: Smart Calendar: Choose the dates. Already occupied or blocked days appear disabled to avoid Overbooking.
c4.process_item_3: Economy: Select the agreed Currency and Total stay amount.
c4.searcher_desc: In the Home Dashboard you will find a powerful tool to quickly check if you have free units for a range of dates. It's ideal for responding to instant queries.
c4.tip: Pro Tip: Before confirming, check alerts on your Home Dashboard. The synced calendar lets you see at a glance if you have sufficient time margins for cleanings between check-ins.

c5.title: 5. Annual Rentals
c5.intro: Regentum allows managing annual lease contracts with the same ease as temporary ones, but with specific tools for tracking monthly installments and automatic adjustments.
c5.start_desc: To register a new long-term rental, go to the Annuals tab within the Property File.
c5.plan_desc: Upon saving the contract, the system automatically generates a complete Payment Plan. Each month is presented as a pending installment with its configured due date.
c5.tracking_desc: Within the contract detail, you can register payments. The system updates the balance in real-time and changes the installment status to 'Paid' or 'Partial Payment'.
c5.adjustment_desc: When the adjustment period arrives (e.g., every 6 months), the system will notify you. Upon entering the new amount, it will automatically apply to all future installments.
c5.tip: Tip: You can add internal notes for specific agreements.

c6.title: 6. Sync and iCal
c6.intro: Regentum allows syncing the availability of your properties with external platforms using the standard iCal format. This avoids manual entry and reduces availability error risks.
c6.sync_desc: Obtain the sync link from the 'iCal Sync' box in the property file.
c6.sync_path: Google Calendar: In 'Other calendars' (+), choose 'From URL'.
c6.sync_action: Airbnb: Listings > Pricing and availability > Import calendar.
c6.external_desc: Booking: Calendar > Sync calendars > Connect another.
c6.external_google: Paste the Regentum-generated link into the target platform.
c6.external_airbnb: Airbnb periodically syncs changes from Regentum.
c6.external_booking: Booking ensures dates don't overlap with other sources.
c6.blocks_desc: You can close dates for maintenance or personal use from the Blocks tab.
c6.blocks_path: Each block will be reflected in the iCal feed.
c6.blocks_action: This prevents bookings on other channels during that period.
c6.tip: Pro Tip: iCal sync is one-way (Regentum to outside).

c7.title: 7. Financial Control
c7.intro: When registering a payment, the booking balance is automatically updated. If the payment is total, the booking will be marked as paid; if it's partial, you will see the remaining balance.
c7.payments_desc: Use the bank icon on each booking to register money entries.
c7.payments_step: The system updates the debit balance instantly.
c7.debt_desc: In the home dashboard and listings, bookings with pending balances will appear highlighted in orange with the legend WITH DEBT.
c7.reports_desc: Analyze net profitability by deducting expenses and commissions.
c7.tip: Tip: Use the 'With Debt' filter to identify pending payments at a glance.

c8.title: 8. Signatures and Settlements
c8.intro: Take your management to the next level with digital signatures and transparent settlements.
c8.signature_desc: The tenant opens the link on their mobile, reviews the contract, and draws their signature. Upon confirming, the booking will be automatically marked as 'Signed' in the system.
c8.sig_step_1: Press the Blue Pen icon on a booking.
c8.sig_step_2: Send the generated link via WhatsApp to the tenant.
c8.sig_step_3: Receive the signature and the contract will be legally backed.
c8.pdf_desc: Both you and the tenant can download the official PDF from the 'View Contract' button anytime.
c8.pdf_step: The PDF includes the stamped signatures of both parties.
c8.owner_liq_desc: Generating a settlement is simple: Enter the Property File → Settlements tab → '+ New Settlement'.
c8.liq_step_1: Select the collections and expenses for the period.
c8.liq_step_2: The system will automatically deduct your configured commission.
c8.liq_step_3: Save and send the 'Settlement View' link to the owner for them to review the detail and download their receipt.
c8.tip: Tip: Owners can consult their history in their own private portal.

markers.title: Marker Dictionary
markers.desc: Use these codes in your templates to insert dynamic data automatically.

owners.access_desc: To enable an owner to see their portal, follow these steps:
owners.access_step1: Register the owner's Google email in the Settings / Owners tab.
owners.access_step2: Ensure that same email is in the 'Owner Email' field of each Property.
owners.access_step3: Send the Regentum link to the Owner for them to log in with their Google user; the application will recognize them automatically.
owners.func1: View current and future occupancy calendar.
owners.func2: Consult and download their account settlements.
owners.func3: View notes and useful information sent by administration.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick Operation Answers
faq.q1: How do I add a new property?
faq.a1: Go to the 'Properties' section and click the 'New Property' button. Fill in the required details and click 'Save'.
faq.q2: How do I register a payment?
faq.a2: Find the booking in the 'Bookings' list and click the 'Payments' icon. There you can register the amount received and the currency.
faq.q3: What are mail and contract templates for?
faq.a3: With templates you avoid having to repeatedly write the same information. With a contract template associated with a property, each time you add a booking, the template will take the new data thanks to dynamic markers. This improves safety against errors and optimizes your times. You can have as many mail templates as you want.
faq.q4: How do I use email templates?
faq.a4: Create your email templates from Settings/Templates. Include markers (you will see the list of available markers) to handle dynamic data. For example, {{inquilino.nombre}} will put the Tenant's Name according to the context.
faq.q5: What does calendar synchronization consist of?
faq.a5: By syncing calendars with other platforms, when entering a Booking in Regentum, the other platforms will see this occupancy and block their dates to avoid overlaps.
faq.q6: Are dates blocked in Regentum if a platform, e.g. AirBnb, receives a booking?
faq.a6: No, the blocking is only outgoing. You block others, but not vice versa. You receive the Booking notice and must register it in your application.
faq.a7: No, calendar propagation can take up to a couple of hours. It is something external to Regentum or rental platforms.

tester.title: Are you a Beta User?
tester.desc: Thank you for helping us perfect {{name}}. Your feedback is vital to us.
